overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, foggy cyberpunk waterfront promenade at night. The player passes a pedestrian and observes two flying vehicles passing overhead while walking past palm trees, street lamps, and industrial structures. Game engine footage with cinematic neon-lit atmosphere and heavy rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront promenade lined with palm trees

events.description: pedestrian walks past the camera from center to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet promenade while rain falls heavily

notable_agents.action: walking toward and past the camera on the right side of the path

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade against the foggy sky
steep concrete wall with metal railings and stairs ascending on the left
tall modern street lamps casting yellow light on the wet pavement
green and yellow painted benches along the right side of the path
illuminated vertical billboards displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked waterfront promenade at night, with palm trees swaying in the wind along the left side. The camera walks forward past green benches and glowing advertising kiosks on the right, while a concrete retaining wall with stairs rises on the left. A pedestrian walks toward the camera and passes by on the right around the 8-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: promenade end with security gate and flying vehicle traffic overhead

events.description: flying vehicle with blue thrusters appears in the sky from the left
camera tilts upward to follow the flying vehicle passing directly overhead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the gate while looking up at the flying vehicle passing overhead

notable_agents.action: flying car approaching from the left with glowing blue thrusters, passing overhead

entered.detail: tall silver metal barricade with horizontal slats blocking the end of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a metal security gate at the end of the promenade while a flying vehicle descends from the foggy sky. The vehicle with blue glowing thrusters flies slowly from left to right, passing directly overhead as the camera tilts up to follow it. The palm trees and street lamps now appear closer on the left as the advertising kiosks and benches fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront industrial zone with distant city lights

events.description: camera tilts back down to forward view after the flying vehicle passes
second flying vehicle enters from the right and flies across the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path past industrial buildings while observing aerial traffic

notable_agents.action: second flying vehicle entering from the right, flying leftward across the foggy sky

entered.detail: low industrial structures with red neon lighting and dark silhouettes
fog-obscured city lights and structures visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Passing the metal gate, the scene opens into a wider waterfront area with industrial buildings glowing with red lights on the right. The camera continues walking forward as the first flying vehicle disappears into the fog. Around 50 seconds, a second flying vehicle enters from the right and flies across the sky. The palm trees recede into the distance on the left as the path continues through the rainy, foggy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-soaked cyberpunk promenade that gradually opens into a wider industrial waterfront. It begins by moving past swaying palm trees and glowing advertising kiosks, with a lone pedestrian passing by on the right. As the camera approaches a metal security gate, the view tilts upward to follow a flying vehicle with blue thrusters descending through the fog and gliding overhead. The scene then expands beyond the gate into a broader area where the palm trees recede and red-lit industrial buildings emerge on the right. Finally, the camera continues forward through the heavy rain as a second flying vehicle crosses the foggy night sky.
